member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Collections.QuadTree`1
member.summary: A Quadtree is a structure designed to partition space so that it's faster to find out what is inside or outside a given area. See http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quadtree.
member.remarks: This Quadtree contains items that have an area (). It will store a reference to the item in the quad that is just big enough to hold it. Each quad has a bucket that contains multiple items.

member.name: M:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Collections.QuadTreeNode`1.Query(KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Primitives.RectangleD)
member.summary: Query the QuadTree for items that are in the given area

member.name: M:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Coloring.IColorizer.GetColor(KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Primitives.LayoutItem)
member.summary: Gets color for the specified .
member.returns: Can return to use the default color ().

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Coloring.RandomColorizer
member.summary: Allows random colors for the word cloud text.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Coloring.SpecificColorizer
member.summary: Colors specific words with provided colors.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Drawing.IGraphicEngine
member.summary: Can draw and measure texts.

member.name: M:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Drawing.IGraphicEngine.Measure(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Measures with weight proportional to .
member.returns: Width and height of the and location of its baseline (x/y are horizontal/vertical offsets of the leftmost point of the baseline).

member.name: M:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Drawing.IGraphicEngine.Draw(KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Primitives.PointD,KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Primitives.RectangleD,System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Draws with weight proportional to .

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Drawing.SkGraphicEngine
member.summary: that uses .

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Layouts.ILayout
member.summary: Can arrange words into some cloud.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Layouts.SpiralLayout
member.summary: Arranges words on a spiral starting in center and going outwards.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Primitives.LayoutItem
member.summary: Word arranged somewhere in word cloud.

member.name: P:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Primitives.LayoutItem.Rectangle
member.summary: Bounding box of the word.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Sizers.ISizer
member.summary: Converter from count to font size.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Sizers.LogSizer
member.summary: Converts counts to font sizes using .
member.remarks: Inspired by Wowchemy's Tag Cloud (commit b647d7e81a5ac59326fe8e5a1424df6a8bff7146, file wowchemy/layouts/partials/widgets/tag_cloud.html).

member.name: M:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.Utilities.ColorUtil.ToHexString(System.Drawing.Color)
member.summary: Converts to hex string.

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.WordCloudGenerator`1
member.summary: Service for arranging and drawing word clouds.

member.name: M:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.WordCloudGenerator`1.Draw
member.summary: Draws the word cloud into .

member.name: T:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.WordCloudInput
member.summary: Input to .

member.name: P:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.WordCloudInput.ItemMargin
member.summary: Margin around each word in the cloud.

member.name: P:KnowledgePicker.WordCloud.WordCloudInput.CutOut
member.summary: Rectangle where no words shall be placed.
